field.expression: date(calldate)
field.label: Fecha

field.expression: date_format( calldate, '%H:%i:%s' )
field.label: hora

field.expression: (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)
field.label: Origen

field.expression: (CASE WHEN length((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) = 3 and length(dst) = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
CONCAT(src,dst)
CONCAT(src)
CONCAT(dst)

(case when length((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) = 3 then (select CONCAT(Nombre, ' ', apellido) from HTXUSERS where HTXUSERS.interno = (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end) limit 1) end)

ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.ctafan FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1),'')

(SELECT group_concat( ctafan separator '
') FROM CCTCUENT where (replace(ctatel, ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' ) and baja = 0 and length((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) > 3 )

(CONCAT(ifnull((case when length((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) = 3 then (select CONCAT(Nombre, ' ', apellido) from HTXUSERS where HTXUSERS.interno = (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end) limit 1) end), ''), ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.ctafan FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1), ''), ifnull((SELECT group_concat( ctafan separator '
') FROM CCTCUENT where (replace(ctatel, ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) ,'%') and trim( (case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) != '' ) and baja = 0 and length((case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)) > 3 ), '')) )
field.label: Nombre Origen

field.expression: case when dst = 998 then 'seguimiento_audio_tel.xml' else '' end
case when dst = 998 then 1 else '' end
case when dst = 998 then left(dstchannel, 15) end
(case when length(dst) = 3 then (select CONCAT(Nombre, ' ', apellido) from HTXUSERS where HTXUSERS.interno = dst limit 1) end)

ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.ctafan FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length(dst) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim( dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1),'')

(SELECT group_concat( ctafan separator '
') FROM CCTCUENT where (replace(ctatel, ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) and baja = 0 and length(dst) > 3 )

field.label: Nombre Destino
field.expression:
( CONCAT( IFNULL((case when length(dst) = 3 then (select CONCAT(Nombre, ' ', apellido) from HTXUSERS where HTXUSERS.interno = dst limit 1) end), ''), IFNULL( (SELECT CCTCUENT.ctafan FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length(dst) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim( dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1), ''), IFNULL((SELECT group_concat( ctafan separator '
') FROM CCTCUENT where (replace(ctatel, ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) and baja = 0 and length(dst) > 3 ), '') ) )
sec_to_time(duration)
field.label: Tiempo

field.expression: case when userfield != '' then SUBSTRING_INDEX(userfield, ':', -1) end
field.label: Audio
